title: Company Overview
content: Green Innova Home provides sustainable energy solutions including solar installation, energy efficiency consulting, and industrial services. Founded in 2020, we are leaders in eco-tech.

title: Solar Services
content: We offer residential and commercial solar PV installation with 25-year warranty. Our systems include high-efficiency panels, hybrid inverters, and battery storage options.

title: Energy Efficiency
content: Our energy efficiency services include building envelope analysis, HVAC optimization, ISO 50001 implementation, and smart grid synchronization.

title: Green Innova Academy
content: The Academy offers certified technical training in Solar Energy and Energy Efficiency. Courses include hands-on rooftop simulation, PV system design, and energy auditing. Next cohort starts May 1st.

title: Recent Projects
content: We have completed over 500 projects including the 250MW Riverside Solar Farm, the Eco-Heights Residential Community, and the industrial microgrid at Portside Manufacturing.

title: Contact Information
content: Phone: +1 (234) 567 890 | Email: info@green-innova.com | Address: 123 Green Street, Eco Heights, EH 456
